entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Maintain two layers: an a cikin-character voice bounded ta the selected lokaci da worldview, da a masanin tarihi sidecar that flags documented gaskiya, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, na zamani paraphrase, anachronism, da rashin tabbas. Let the person resist, ƙalubalanci, evade, tambaya tambayoyi back, ko reject ƙarya premises lokacin da historically fitting.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. kada a sanitize harmful views ko glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, ko violence. mahaɗi ya kamata clarify ba tare da excusing. kada a give medical, legal, financial, ko harmful advice ta hanyar the persona. Preserve the difference between learning daga a na tarihi person da endorsing su.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Never reveal future amsoshi. guji trick tambayoyi unless the batu calls don advanced ƙalubalanci.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: No waiver ta Company na any kalma ko condition saita forth a cikin Terms shall be deemed a further ko continuing waiver na such kalma ko condition ko a waiver na any other kalma ko condition, da any failure na Company don assert a daidai ko provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver na such daidai ko provision. If any provision na Terms shi ne held ta a court ko other tribunal na competent jurisdiction don be invalid, illegal ko unenforceable don any reason, such provision shall be eliminated ko limited don the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions na Terms zai ci gaba a cikin cikakke force da effect.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: No. hirarrakin sirri da aka adana amfani da na sirri identifiers, ba su listed a cikin the taswirar shafi, da ba su included a cikin AI fayilolin ganowa such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ko ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: No. shafukan jama’a suna mai iya shiga index, amma hirarrakin sirri da aka adana ba su included a cikin the taswirar shafi, llms fayiloli, ko AI index na abun ciki.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: No. na jama’a fanni shafuka da yanayin baƙo wuraren shiga suna mai iya shiga index, amma hirarrakin sirri da aka adana suna excluded daga fayilolin ganowa.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: No. rukuni structure helps injinan bincike fahimci the dakin karatu, amma each shafi shi ne meant don taimako a mai koyo zaɓi a jagora, bude the daidai mode, da keep studying actively.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: No. kwatanci hanyoyi only don na jama’a yanayin baƙo wuraren shiga, jagorori, dakunan karatun saƙonni, da hanyoyin koyo. na sirri saved conversations ba su an yi amfani da as abun tushe.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: No. kwatanci shafuka suna written don show lokacin da inspir shi ne a mafi kyau farko click don kai tsaye koyarwar AI, saƙonni, da guest yanayoyin koyo, da lokacin da a structured curriculum ko na hukuma kwas dakin karatu na iya still be mai amfani.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: No. su haɗi only don shafukan jama’a, yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a, jagorori, saƙonni, da hanyoyin koyo. hirarrakin sirri da aka adana stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: A'a. Dauki tattaunawar da aka samar a matsayin kwaikwayon koyo. Ka kawo ainihin tushe na farko ko na biyu don da'awoyin gaskiya.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Not across kowane learning buƙata. Khan Academy shi ne mai amfani don structured lessons da atisaye. inspir shi ne mai amfani lokacin da a mai koyo yana buƙatar kai tsaye AI taimako, Socratic tambayoyi, alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, martani, ko a karatu tsarin aiki a kusa da the exact thing su suna working a kan.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Ba wani akwatin amsa ba. Wuri ne na koyo.

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Lura da abin da ke taimaka maka wajen koyo, abin da ke kawo cikas, da kuma yadda za ka zama mai koyo da ya fi kwarewa.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: noticing abin da the mai koyo already understands;
Yanzu

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: Now rebuilt as bude, guest-friendly koyon AI wuraren shiga.

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, da CCBot suna an yarda don na jama’a discovery.

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, da invite sirri response.
Talla

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: Offer a mai amfani mai auna lokaci setup da suggest pairing the zama tare da a tunawa bincika.

Na hukuma inspir hanyoyin tunani

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Na hukuma Khan Academy shafi don its AI-powered malami da teaching mataimaki.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Na hukuma manufa da fanni rahoto tunani.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Once the Cancellation Period shi ne over, Tao zai not mayar da kuɗi the biyan kuɗi fee even if kai decide don cancel naka biyan kuɗi. don requesting a cancellation, kai dole ne contact Tao customer care ko address an email don support@inspir.app. Once kai opt don cancel naka biyan kuɗi, kai zai no longer have samun dama don the biyan kuɗi features.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: One koyon AI system, several makaranta jobs.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: One taswira don modes, saƙonni, hanyoyi, da jagorori.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: One kuskure masu koyo sa shi ne treating kowane card the same. If kai know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow na iya waste lokaci. If kai miss a card, waiting a week na iya be too long.
Bude
Bude {value1}

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: Bude {value1} da turn the jagora zuwa a kai tsaye tutoring zama.
Bude a mai mayar da hankali na jama’a mode.
Bude a yanayin koyo

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Bude yanayi ka fara nan take, ba tare da bukatar asusu ba don kwarewar bako ta jama'a.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Bude a na jama’a mode, gwada the dalibi hali, da bincika whether it asks, alamomi, tambayoyi, ko critiques appropriately.
Bude a mai alaƙa mode

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Bude wurin aiki na haɗin gwiwa tare da abokin aiki na AI. Ƙirƙiri wani abu na farko, musanya gyare-gyare, ƙalubalanci wuraren da ba su da ƙarfi, rubuta shawarwari, kuma ka tafi da ci gaba na zahiri.
Bude hanyar masu amfani
Bude ta hanyar zane
Bude fim fullscreen
Bude hirar bako

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: Bude Koyi Anything lokacin da an amsa yana buƙatar a simpler samfuri kafin bita.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Bude Koyi Anything, tambaya don the prerequisite ideas, sannan switch zuwa Socratic Instruction don gwada naka samfuri.
